/cwe/weakness/317.Name: Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information in GUI
/cwe/weakness/317.Description: The product stores sensitive information in cleartext within the GUI.
/cwe/weakness/317.ExtendedDescription: An attacker can often obtain data from a GUI, even if hidden, by using an API to directly access GUI objects such as windows and menus. Even if the information is encoded in a way that is not human-readable, certain techniques could determine which encoding is being used, then decode the information.

ModesOfIntroduction.Note: OMISSION: This weakness is caused by missing a security tactic during the architecture and design phase.
